title: Toli tree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ScreeSkater.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A [[skree-skater]] among toli trees]]
The '''toli tree''' was a plant unique to the planet [[Galantos]]. Consisting of a thick, gnarled trunk that grew up out of the gelatin sea, a toli tree typically had fewer than ten leaves. The plant was nourished by soaking up nutrients from the gelatin through its system of needle-roots, rather than by photosynthesis. The leaves were used as sails to carry seed pods on the wind.

==Sources==
